creator: jamie@jamiesdomain.org.uk
text:
When using a SELECT box in a form that needs to be extended
	with the more button at bottom of list
	you can no longer enter information
	into INPUT fields or the address bar

Fix: 

Only know fix is to completly close netscape and use the SELECT box
	last to submit details. Still renders the address bar useless afterwards	though.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Goto a page with a form, use a SELECT box and that is large
	and need you to extend it across the screen with the more box
	at the bottom of the list and then try and type
	something into an INPUT field or address bar
